no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: TD-035 already exists at docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-035-artifact-search-semantics.md and contains the requested search ladder, 256 KiB body cap, binary skip rules, and 200 ms p95 budget. The blocker is the repo-wide `ddx doc audit --json --exit-zero`, which still reports pre-existing unrelated integrity issues outside this TD (for example the FEAT-002 -> FEAT-008 -> FEAT-013 -> FEAT-014 -> FEAT-016 -> FEAT-020 -> MET-002 -> SD-013 -> SD-019 -> FEAT-002 cycle and duplicate_id entries under .agents/skills/docs/). Because the audit is not clean in this worktree, AC3 cannot be proven by this attempt without broader repository repairs.
